skill.name: nano-banana
skill.description: Generate images with Google Gemini native image models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Gemini 3 Pro Image, Gemini 2.5 Flash Image. Capabilities: text-to-image, image editing, multi-image input. Triggers: nano banana, gemini image, gemini 3 pro image, gemini 2.5 flash image, google image generation, native image generation, gemini native image
skill.summary: Generate images with Google Gemini native image models via inference.sh CLI. Models: Gemini 3 Pro Im...
skill.author: inferen-sh

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged external commands and network patterns in the SKILL.md file, but these are false positives. The 'external_commands' findings are bash command examples in code blocks (documentation), not actual code execution. The 'network' findings are legitimate URLs to the inference.sh service documentation. No cryptographic code or malicious patterns exist. This is a legitimate documentation file for an image generation skill.

content.value_statement: Quickly create images using Google Gemini native image models through a simple CLI interface. This skill provides a convenient wrapper for the inference.sh platform to generate photorealistic images, illustrations, and artwork from text prompts.
actual_capabilities: Generate images from text prompts using Gemini 3 Pro and Gemini 2.5 Flash models
Create multiple images in a single request with configurable count
Specify custom aspect ratios including 1:1, 16:9, 9:16, 4:3, and 3:4
Edit existing images by providing input image URLs for modification
Generate high-resolution images up to 4K quality
Enable Google Search grounding for real-time information in generated images
limitations: Requires inference.sh CLI installation and an active inference.sh account
Image generation is subject to rate limits based on account tier
Quality and availability depend on Google Gemini model status

use_cases.title: Quick Image Generation
use_cases.description: Generate images from text prompts using Gemini models for immediate visual content
use_cases.target_user: Content creators and marketers needing quick image generation

use_cases.title: Custom Image Creation
use_cases.description: Create images with specific aspect ratios, resolutions, and artistic styles
use_cases.target_user: Designers requiring precise image specifications for projects

use_cases.title: AI-Powered Image Editing
use_cases.description: Edit existing images using Gemini's image understanding and generation capabilities
use_cases.target_user: Users needing to modify or enhance photos with AI

prompt_templates.title: Basic Text-to-Image
prompt_templates.scenario: Create a simple single-subject image with a specified artistic style

prompt_templates.title: Multiple Images with Specs
prompt_templates.prompt: Create {num_images} images with {aspect_ratio} aspect ratio showing {description}
prompt_templates.scenario: Generate multiple images with specific dimensions and content

prompt_templates.title: Image Editing
prompt_templates.scenario: Modify an existing image by providing modification instructions

prompt_templates.title: High-Resolution Detailed Generation
prompt_templates.prompt: Generate {resolution} image with {style} style showing {subject}. Include {details}
prompt_templates.scenario: Create detailed, high-quality images with specific requirements

output_examples.output: A high-quality image of a futuristic city at sunset with flying cars and neon lights

output_examples.input: logo design for a coffee shop, minimalist
output_examples.output: Four minimalist logo concepts for a coffee shop in various black and white styles

output_examples.input: Edit this image to add autumn colors
output_examples.output: The original image modified with autumn foliage, warm orange and red tones, and seasonal atmosphere

best_practices: Provide detailed prompts with specific styles, lighting conditions, and composition instructions
Use appropriate aspect ratios for your intended output format (social media, print, etc.)
Start with lower resolution for quick previews, then upgrade to 4K for final output
anti_patterns: Using vague prompts without specific details or style guidance
Requesting extremely high resolutions for initial generations
Not accounting for model availability or rate limits

faq.question: How do I install the inference.sh CLI?
Do I need an inference.sh account?
faq.answer: Yes, run infsh login after installation to authenticate

faq.question: Which Gemini model should I use?
faq.answer: Use Gemini 3 Pro for best quality, Gemini 2.5 Flash for faster results

faq.question: Can I edit existing images?
faq.answer: Yes, provide image URLs in the images array parameter

faq.question: Is there a rate limit?
faq.answer: Limits vary by your inference.sh subscription plan
